code: import{SET_ALERT,REMOVE_ALERT}from'../actions/types';const initialState=[];export default function(){let state=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:initialState;let action=arguments.length>1?arguments[1]:undefined;const type=action.type,payload=action.payload;switch(type){case SET_ALERT:return[...state,payload];case REMOVE_ALERT:return state.filter(alert=>alert.id!==payload);default:return state;}}
